title: Evidence summary for lk_fxd_ndf_cutoff_by_pair_and_locode
summary: Shared cutoff lookup behavior is supported by workbook table shape, Java static mapping lookup code, XSLT templates, and tests. Representative cutoff rows contain blank hedge source/page cells; blank values are preserved by the draft lookup output. Cutoff row 52 contains values but no CONTRACT or LOCODE key, so it does not participate in the lookup. Reverse-pair fallback is explicit in Java and tests even though workbook rows are keyed in a single currency-pair order.
warnings: OCR was performed from photographed monitor images; some long target XPaths were truncated and reconstructed by convention.
Source and target element casing was normalized to visible FpML/SCBML conventions.
Workbook spelling includes `PRIMARY_SOUCE_*`; this draft preserves visible column spelling in lookup return fields.
The photographed pack is accepted for local demo signoff, but source-photo reconstruction should be rechecked before production signoff.
